entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop being studied for root traits under drought stress

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water deficit that plants must defend against

entities.name: ROOT TRAITS
entities.description: Morphological and anatomical characteristics of the root system

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the chickpea genotypes

entities.name: RAIN-OUT SHELTER
entities.description: A facility used to control water availability by excluding rain

entities.name: PVC LYSIMETERS
entities.description: Containers used to grow plants and measure root growth and water use

entities.name: WATER STRESS LEVELS
entities.description: Varying degrees of moisture deficit including high, medium, and low stress

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: A specific root trait measuring root length per unit volume

entities.name: TOTAL ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: A specific root trait measuring the total mass of roots after drying

entities.name: ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: A specific root trait measuring the mass of roots after drying

entities.name: ROOT:SHOOT RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of root biomass to shoot biomass

entities.name: WINRHIZO SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used for scanning and analyzing root systems

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine significant differences between genotypes and water regimes

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The mass of the above-ground plant parts

entities.name: ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The mass of the below-ground plant parts

entities.name: TOTAL ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The cumulative length of the root system

entities.name: ROOT ANATOMY
entities.description: The internal structural organization of the roots

entities.name: DESI TYPE
entities.description: A type of chickpea genotype that performed better under low moisture regimes

entities.name: KABULI TYPE
entities.description: A type of chickpea genotype that responded better under high moisture regimes

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand and produce under drought conditions

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Agricultural programs aimed at improving crop traits for better performance
